findings.description: Source contains 3 h2-level sections (機能概要, 電文仕様, エンティティ情報) but knowledge file merges the last two into a single section s2. 電文仕様 and エンティティ情報 are independent top-level sections in the source and their combined content in s2 is large enough to warrant a separate section.
findings.source_evidence: Source h2 headings: '機能概要' (--------), '電文仕様' (========), 'エンティティ情報' (================). Knowledge file only defines s1 and s2.
